raw_consumer_statement: In XX/XX/2023 i had paid my Home Depot/Citi store credit card off which had a {$520.00} balance. I subsequently recieved a statement reflecting the XXXX balance along with a letter from Home Depot concerning a security incident of an unauthhorized party gaining access to personal information of my account. My next billing statement had a balance of {$28000.00} due, which is fraudulent, as i have not charged anything. And these fraudulent charges are being reported to the credit bureaus reflected on my credit report.
